subcodes.first_line: O thou who art filled with the love of God! I have perused thy letter, which was laden with spiritual sentiments and attractions [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایتها الممتلئه بمحبه الله قد اطلعت بمرسومک المشحون باحساسات روحانیه و انجذابات
subcodes.subjects: @rebellion and misdeeds of Mirza Yahya; the Azalis, @law of divorce, @alcohol and drugs; tobacco; opium
